acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

returns.contractBalance: current USDC balance of this contract
returns.solvent: true if contract holds enough USDC for all obligations
returns.totalAccounted: sum of all keyBalances + all earnings

checkUpkeep(bytes).details: Retorna true si han pasado >= UPKEEP_INTERVAL desde el último upkeep.      No requiere checkData — se ignora.

params.creator: The registered creator wallet — USDC is sent here regardless of msg.sender.
params.deadline: Unix timestamp after which the voucher is invalid.
params.grossAmount: Gross USDC amount (atomics). Contract deducts platform fee on-chain.
params.sig: EIP-712 signature from an operator over (creator, grossAmount, deadline, nonce).

computePaymentId(string,address,uint256,.details: Off-chain verifiable: anyone can recompute with public data.         paymentId = keccak256(slug, payer, amount, nonce, chainId)

depositForKey(bytes32,address,uint256,ui.details: flow: KeyOperator calls this after user signs the ERC-3009 authorization off-chain.      USDC is transferred from the user directly to this contract.

params.amount: USDC amount in atomic units (6 decimals)
params.keyId: bytes32 derived from SHA-256 of the raw API key (hex string → bytes32)
params.owner: User wallet address (must have signed the ERC-3009 authorization)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

performUpkeep(bytes).details: Emite UpkeepPerformed y actualiza lastUpkeepTimestamp.      El settlement real sigue ejecutándose desde el operador backend.      Cualquier address puede llamar performUpkeep — el intervalo protege      de abuso (solo ejecutable cada 23h máximo).

recordInvocation(string,address,uint256,.details: flow: x402Called by the backend AFTER the x402 USDC payment has been confirmed      on-chain (Ultravioleta DAO facilitator settles to this contract address).      The `amount` of USDC must already be in this contract.

params.amount: USDC amount in atomic units (must match agent.pricePerCall)
params.payer: Address that paid (human wallet or AI agent wallet)

refundKeyToEarnings(bytes32).details: flow: KeyOperador llama esto cuando el usuario cierra su key.      El owner luego usa withdraw() como cualquier creator.

registerAgent(string,uint256,address,uin.details: Called by the backend operator when a creator publishes an agent.      pricePerCall is in USDC atomic units (6 decimals).      e.g. $0.02 = 20000

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

selfRegisterAgent(string,uint256,uint64).details: msg.sender becomes the creator. No operator needed.      WAS-160g: Dual Registration — allows creators to register on-chain directly.      NA-301: Registration fee required (if > 0).      NA-303: Slug length <= 80 enforced.      NA-304: pricePerCall range [1000, 100_000_000] enforced.

setDailySettlementCap(uint256).details: NA-212: Cap no puede ser 0 (deja el sistema sin límite) ni exceder 100k USDC.

setRegistrationFee(uint256).details: NA-301: Fee goes to contract treasury. 0 = free registration.

settleKeyBatch(bytes32,string[],uint256[.details: flow: KeyGas amortizado: una tx cubre cientos de llamadas.      slugs[i] y amounts[i] corresponden 1-a-1.      El balance total se deduce primero para evitar reentrancy parcial.

submitReputationBatch(string[],uint16[],.details: Called daily by cron operator. Overwrites previous values.         avgRatings scaled ×100 (uint16): 0–500 (0.00–5.00 stars).         For thumbs up/down systems: up=500, down=0, mixed=proportional.

params.newOwner: New creator address. Cannot be address(0).

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

updateAgent(string,uint256).details: Callable by the creator themselves or by an operator.      WAS-161: active removed — status controlled off-chain in Supabase.

withdraw().details: flow: x402 (also accessible after Key refund via refundKeyToEarnings)

withdrawFor(address).details: flow: x402Useful for automatic payouts triggered by the backend.

withdrawKey(bytes32,uint256).details: Partial or full withdrawal — key stays active unless fully drained.         No whenNotPaused: users must always be able to recover their funds.

params.amount: USDC amount in atomic units (6 decimals)
params.keyId: bytes32 key identifier (SHA-256 of raw key, padded)

EMERGENCY_TIMEOUT().notice: 30 days without operator activity → users can emergency-withdraw

UPKEEP_INTERVAL().notice: Intervalo mínimo entre upkeeps (23h para no chocar con el cron diario de 02:00 UTC)

claimEarnings(address,uint256,uint256,by.notice: Withdraw earnings for a creator via an operator-signed EIP-712 voucher.

computePaymentId(string,address,uint256,.notice: Compute the canonical paymentId for an invocation.

dailySettledAmount().notice: USDC settled in the current 24h window

dailySettlementCap().notice: Max USDC that can be settled in a 24h window (6 decimals)

dailySettlementReset().notice: Timestamp when the current 24h window started

depositForKey(bytes32,address,uint256,ui.notice: Fund an API key with USDC via ERC-3009 transferWithAuthorization.

executeFee().notice: Step 2: execute the proposed fee after timelock expires.

executeTreasury().notice: NA-202: Execute treasury change after timelock expires.

getDailySettlementStatus().notice: Returns current daily settlement window status.

getReputation(string).notice: Read on-chain reputation for an agent.

keyBalances(bytes32).notice: keyId (bytes32 from SHA-256 key_hash) → on-chain USDC balance

keyOwners(bytes32).notice: keyId → address that can withdraw the key's remaining balance

lastOperatorActivity().notice: Timestamp of the last operator activity. If > EMERGENCY_TIMEOUT has passed, key owners can exit trustlessly.

lastUpkeepTimestamp().notice: Timestamp del último upkeep ejecutado por Chainlink Automation

operators(address).notice: trusted backend operators (can call registerAgent / recordInvocation)

pause().notice: Pause deposits and batch settlement. Emergency use only.

proposeFee(uint16).notice: Step 1: propose a new platform fee. Executable after 48h.

proposeTreasury(address).notice: NA-202: Propose treasury address change (48h timelock).

recordInvocation(string,address,uint256,.notice: Record an invocation and split earnings.

refundKeyToEarnings(bytes32).notice: Mueve el balance restante de una key a earnings del owner.

registerAgent(string,uint256,address,uin.notice: Register a new agent in the marketplace.

selfRegisterAgent(string,uint256,uint64).notice: Self-registration: creator registers their own agent and pays gas.

setFreeRegistrationsPerUser(uint256).notice: Set how many free registrations each user gets before fee kicks in.

setRegistrationFee(uint256).notice: Set the registration fee for selfRegisterAgent.

settleKeyBatch(bytes32,string[],uint256[.notice: Liquida un batch de llamadas de key en una sola tx.

submitReputationBatch(string[],uint16[],.notice: Submit aggregated reputation scores for a batch of agents.

totalEarnings().notice: Sum of all pending earnings -- updated on every earnings operation

totalKeyBalances().notice: Sum of all keyBalances -- updated on every key operation

transferAgent(string,address).notice: Transfer agent ownership to a new creator.

usedPaymentIds(bytes32).notice: paymentId → already recorded (idempotency guard for recordInvocation)

usedVouchers(bytes32).notice: nonce → already used (idempotency guard for claimEarnings)

withdraw().notice: Creator claims all pending USDC earnings.

withdrawFor(address).notice: Operator-triggered withdrawal on behalf of a creator.

withdrawKey(bytes32,uint256).notice: Creator withdraws USDC directly from their key balance.
